info.title: The WIZARD Callable API
info.summary: Generated contract for callable runtime, planned DB-backed, accepted no-op, and DEV mock APIs.
info.description: This specification is generated from docs/api/openapi-source.json. DEV mock operations and accepted no-op placeholders are labeled with x-wizard-surface so they are not mistaken for production-ready DB-backed APIs.

tags.name: API Contract
tags.description: Contract discovery and generated OpenAPI metadata.

tags.description: Sync-status read and planned override boundaries.

tags.name: Room Mapping
tags.description: Room-mapping search and planned persistence boundaries.

tags.name: DEV Mock APIs
tags.description: Development-only mock endpoints used by the React DEV frontend.

sessionCookie.name: wizard_session
sessionCookie.description: Local session cookie used by DEV and breakglass flows; production SAML wiring remains environment-managed.

BadRequest.description: The request body, query string, or path parameter was invalid for this operation.

Forbidden.description: The caller is authenticated but lacks the required role, site scope, feature flag, or field-level permission.

NotFound.description: The requested resource or route was not found.

Conflict.description: The request conflicts with the current resource state.

PayloadTooLarge.description: The request payload is larger than this operation accepts.

InternalServerError.description: The server could not complete the operation.

ServiceUnavailable.description: The operation is disabled or the required backing service is unavailable.
